background: The probability density function of a random variable $X$ is defined as follows: $$f(x)= \begin{cases}2 x & 0 \leq \mathrm{x} \leq 1 \\ 0 & \text { otherwise. }\end{cases}$$

task.query: Obtain the cumulative distribution function (CDF) of $X$.
task.answer: The cdf of $X$ is given by $$F(x)= \begin{cases}0 & \mathrm{x}<0 \\ x^2 & 0 \leq \mathrm{x} \leq 1 \\ 1 & x>1 .\end{cases}$$

task.query: Find the median of $X$ by solving $F(m) = 1/2$.
task.answer: Set $\mathrm{F}(m)=1 / 2$, then the median of $X$ is $\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2}$.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
